blockingIssues.description: snipsnap/export/fcpxml.py::_asset_src() drops the first path component for relative source paths (e.g., videos/interview.mp4 -> file:///interview.mp4), generating incorrect media URIs that can break FCPXML import resolution.

appliedUpdates.description: Added export path guidance to .factory/library/architecture.md: source_file may be relative and exporters must preserve full relative path components; CLI export default output is <data_dir>/exports and validators should use sandboxed data dirs to avoid root artifacts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify RED-first expectations for incremental/legacy-file features and require explicit skillFeedback deviations when implementation is changed before tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both export-engine and cli-export reviews observed implementation-first sequencing while reporting followedProcedure=true, indicating ambiguity and inconsistent reporting.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate RED-first ambiguity note from cli-export review.
